doc.field: Ḥammūdī, Najm al-Dīn ʻAbd Allāh. Qiyām Dawlat al-Imārāt al-ʻArabīyah al-Muttaḥidah : mudhakkirāt wa-dirāsāt (Abu Dhabi: [ʻAbd Allāh Najm al-Dīn ʻAbd Allāh Ḥammudī], 2014)
